name: Blizzard Entertainment
description: American developer known for Warcraft, Diablo, StarCraft, Overwatch, and its earlier console games including Blackthorne and The Lost Vikings 2.

eras.title: Console Origins Era
eras.description: The studio begins as Silicon & Synapse and develops console games before adopting the Blizzard name.

eras.title: PC Strategy and Action RPG Era
eras.description: Warcraft, Diablo, StarCraft, and Warcraft III establish Blizzard as a major PC developer.

eras.title: Online Service Era
eras.description: World of Warcraft and later online-focused games define Blizzard's modern identity.
